title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 321.506 - Fire district may contract with private provider — ballot
text:
321.506.  Fire district may contract with private provider — ballot. — 1.  Fire districts in the state of Missouri may contract to a private company to provide fire service only if a majority of voters of the political subdivision authorize such a proposal at a public election.
  2.  The ballot shall be in the following form:
(L. 1996 S.B. 735 § 2) 
Municipal fire departments may contract with private providers for fire protection, vote required, 85.012
